text: Testing plays a crucial role in software development. Unit tests check small, individual parts of code, like a single function or method. Integration tests go further, verifying that different parts of the system work together correctly. Many developers use test-driven development, where you write a test before writing the actual code. This approach forces you to think about requirements first. Together, these practices build confidence. When you have a strong test suite, you can make changes to your code without fear of breaking existing features. Testing reduces bugs and improves software quality.
